  Step 1: Mint ACCESS tokens (native policy from payment key)
  Step 2: Lock ADA at token-gate address
  Step 3: Unlock while holding ACCESS token (should SUCCEED)
  Step 4: Unlock without ACCESS token      (should FAIL)

  The datum stores the gate policy ID and token name.
  The contract reads them from inline datum at spend time.
